title: Baiyuan GEO Platform: A Whitepaper on Building a SaaS for Generative Engine Optimization
description:
An engineering whitepaper documenting the construction of Baiyuan GEO Platform (2024–2026), a SaaS system for Generative Engine Optimization. The system helps brands be cited accurately and consistently across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, DeepSeek, and 15+ AI platforms.

Coverage: seven-dimension AI citation-rate scoring algorithm, AI-Bot-friendly shadow document delivery (AXP) on customer-owned domains, Schema.org three-layer entity knowledge graph, closed-loop hallucination detection & auto-remediation, F12 three-layer structural optimizer (V1 rule-based + V3.1 dual-engine AutoGEO + E-GEO), rag-backend-v2 LLM hallucination hardening (six defense layers), and platform SSOT chain (brand_faq / page_type / alerts unification).

Languages: Traditional Chinese complete (chapters 1–16, ~45,000 characters); English partial (chapters 14–16, ~12,000 words). Earlier English chapters scheduled for v1.2.

License: Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International (CC BY-NC 4.0).
references: Lin, V. (2026). Baiyuan GEO Platform: A Whitepaper on Building a SaaS for Generative Engine Optimization. Version 1.1. Baiyuan Technology. https://github.com/baiyuan-tech/geo-whitepaper
notes: v1.1.1 expansion: adds chapters 14 (F12 three-layer structural optimizer), 15 (rag-backend-v2 hardening, six LLM hallucination defense layers + Wiki Cascade), 16 (platform SSOT chain). English edition initiated covering chapters 14–16. DOI to be assigned by Zenodo upon deposit.
